# [PKT-PRV-069](task-0136): Provider Data Lineage Rules

## Purpose

Implement provider data lineage rules.

## Scope

- Lineage rules
- Tracking
- Visualization

## Implementation

1. Define rules
2. Implement tracking
3. Add visualization

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Rules defined
2. Tracking works
3. Visualization works
